title: Work Statuses should be able to be set up on a recurring schedule/occurrence
excerpt: When setting Work Statutes it would be helpful to set up a recurring schedule for each status instead of having to set it every day. For example, if I always work remotely Tues - Thurs every week and in the office every …

posts.author: astevens (Ann Marie Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml: When setting Work Statutes it would be helpful to set up a recurring schedule for each status instead of having to set it every day. For example, if I always work remotely Tues - Thurs every week and in the office every Friday it would be nice to be able to set that up as recurring schedule.
